steps.title: Identify no solution
steps.content: A system of two linear equations has no solution when the lines are parallel and distinct. That means they have the same slope but different $y$-intercepts.

steps.title: Find the parallel pair
steps.content:
The system
$$
y=12x+2
$$
$$
y=12x+17
$$
has the same slope, $12$, but different intercepts, $2$ and $17$.

steps.title: Choose the system
steps.content: Those two lines never intersect, so the system has no solution. The answer is C.
